name: 609768_001_TC001_DB
description: Database query for appointment prerequisite data

dataSource.query: Select Top 1 * from (select top 1 a.personcontactkey, b.casekey, c.caseactivitykeyreference, b.personkey from PersonModule.PersonContact a, casemodule.[case] b, caseactivitymodule.caseactivityinstance c where a.personkey=b.personkey and b.casekey=c.casekey and c.clrtypedisplayname='Reportable Event' order by newid()) AS Program, (select caseactivitykeyreference from caseactivitymodule.caseactivityinstance where clrtypedisplayname='Reportable Event') as loc order by newid()
